claims.text: CEM can concentrate future samples into model-error pockets because each refit conditions on model-scored elites.
In the controlled pocket world, vanilla CEM can produce worse true return than static non-adaptive proposals.
Model-only repair variants reduce controlled-world regret by penalizing or slowing concentration into uncertain/OOD elites.
The mechanism and repairs transfer to high-dimensional PlaNet/Dreamer-scale latent control benchmarks.
